dropped.reason: too short to carry a claim

meta.model: Gemini gemini-flash-lite-latest · US (and trains on free-tier prompts)

clusters.label: iPad cursor jumping and text input failures
Forced AI features and intrusive UI placement
Lack of Ukrainian and regional interface languages
Severe mobile lag, freezing, and loading failures
App launch crashes and authentication loops
Unexpected data loss and synchronization issues

insights.title: Mandatory AI search bars and persistent chat prompts obscure core navigation and workspace tools.
insights.summary: Recent updates replaced traditional navigation shortcuts and clean headers with prominent AI conversation bars that occupy valuable screen real estate. Customers express frustration that these elements cannot be dismissed or disabled through settings. Many users feel that pushing generative features interferes with their manual organization systems and routine workflows. Providing a toggle to hide or revert these UI additions would greatly improve user satisfaction.

evidence.name: HU
evidence.quote: The button for AI is large and centered on the bottom of your screen instead of a search bar like it used to be. There was also a way to turn it off prior and now there isn't.…

evidence.name: PT
evidence.quote: AI features are garbage. The search being AI first and actual page search in a smaller icon that requires two clicks is the worst UI design i’ve seen in any app ever. Horrific…

evidence.name: MH
evidence.quote: There is a big obtrusive AI search bar at the bottom that I’m always accidentally pressing when going in between apps on my phone. There isn’t even an option to disable it… I just…

insights.recommendation: Add a user settings toggle to completely hide or disable the persistent AI chat bar and restore traditional navigation shortcuts.

insights.title: Typing on iPad causes the screen to auto-adjust and push the cursor completely out of view.
insights.summary: Users report that attempting to edit text or type using an external keyboard on tablet devices causes the viewport to jump downward or shift away from the active line. This layout bug renders the mobile editor virtually unusable for taking notes during lectures or meetings. Reviewers note that this behavior persists across multiple software updates without a fix. Restoring stable typing ergonomics on tablets is essential to prevent churn among mobile users.

evidence.name: CR
evidence.quote: geht seit ein paar Versionen nicht mehr sinnvoll auf dem Ipad. Cursor springt beim schreiben auf den Ipad Pro 11 Zoll (M1) immer nach oben weg und ist nicht sichtbar.

evidence.name: RV
evidence.quote: Great software, great usages for all sorts of people, BUT the mobile app just struggles with one critical bug that makes the whole thing unusable. When I’m typing, the screen…

evidence.name: KR
evidence.quote: Update 21/06/26. Had to lower the rating because for the last month or so Notion stopped working properly with my iPad when I use a Bluetooth keyboard - the pages no longer allow…

insights.recommendation: Fix the auto-scroll and focus-following logic in the mobile text editor so the viewport remains locked on the cursor during typing.

insights.title: Absence of Ukrainian and other regional interface languages creates friction for international users.
insights.summary: A vocal group of international customers highlights the lack of native language support in the mobile and desktop clients. Navigating complex menus and hierarchical settings in English requires extra mental translation, especially during quick note-taking tasks. Reviewers explicitly state they would engage more deeply or upgrade if their native language were available in the interface. Introducing localized language options would open up accessibility to wider regional user bases.

evidence.name: SZ
evidence.quote: there is no Ukrainian language, it's very terrible

evidence.name: НН
evidence.quote: На жаль, української немає, налаштування всі англійською. Коли треба швидко щось записати, ти мусиш перекласти в голові текст, аби зорієнтуватися, що та стрічка в додатку означає.…

evidence.name: AN
evidence.quote: Notion, що це таке? чому ви не перекладаєте ваш додаток на українську мову? складно?!

insights.recommendation: Add interface localization support for Ukrainian and other requested regional languages.
